info.title: Dermasight Backend API
info.description: REST API for Dermasight. Authentication via Paseto v4 local (XChaCha20 encrypted) tokens. Access tokens in `Authorization: Bearer` header, refresh tokens in httpOnly signed cookie.

get.description: Returns system health status. Probes database connectivity.

post.description: Creates a user account with email and password. Returns user object and access token. Sets httpOnly refresh token cookie.

400.description: Validation error or email already in use

post.description: Authenticates with email and password. Returns user object and access token. Sets httpOnly refresh token cookie.
Rotates the refresh token and issues a new access token. Reads `refreshToken` from signed cookie. Old refresh token is deleted and a new one is set.

Set-Cookie.description: New httpOnly signed refresh token cookie

401.description: Missing, invalid, revoked, or expired refresh token

post.description: Blacklists the access token (if provided), deletes the refresh token from database (if cookie present), and clears the refresh cookie.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer access token (optional — will be blacklisted if provided)

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile from the Bearer token.

401.description: Missing, expired, invalid, or revoked token

get.description: Returns all articles ordered by most recent first.

post.description: Creates a new article. Slug is auto-generated from the title.

image.description: Article banner image (JPEG or PNG, max 10MB)

tags.description: JSON array string or comma-separated tags (e.g. "[\"dermatology\"]" or "dermatology,skin")

timeToRead.description: Estimated reading time in minutes (integer as string for multipart)

authorImage.description: Author profile image (JPEG or PNG, max 10MB)

get.description: Returns a single article identified by its URL-friendly slug.

put.description: Updates an existing article by slug. All fields are optional.

image.description: Article banner image (JPEG or PNG, max 10MB)

tags.description: JSON array string or comma-separated tags

timeToRead.description: Reading time in minutes (integer as string for multipart)

authorImage.description: Author profile image (JPEG or PNG, max 10MB)

delete.description: Permanently removes an article by slug.

post.description: Analyzes a skin lesion image and returns severity predictions. Optional authentication stores prediction in history.

file.description: Skin lesion image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 10MB)

400.description: Validation error (missing file or invalid anatomical_site)

get.description: Retrieves authenticated user's past predictions with pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of predictions to return (default 10, max 100)

post.description: Sends a contact form message via SMTP to configured recipients. No authentication required.

BearerAuth.description: Paseto v4 local encrypted access token. Valid for 1 hour.

password.description: Password — min 8 characters, hashed with argon2id

content.description: Body content of the contact message

imageUrl.description: URL to prediction image in R2

inference_time_ms.description: ML model inference time in milliseconds

AuthResponse.description: Authentication response with user and access token

accessToken.description: Paseto v4 local encrypted access token (1 hour expiry)

AccessTokenResponse.description: Response containing only a new access token

accessToken.description: Paseto v4 local encrypted access token (1 hour expiry)
